title: Antilla trichophora
intro: Antilla trichophora, also known as Antilla or Bael tree, is a deciduous tree species native to South Asia, characterized by its unique fruit and medicinal properties. The health benefits of Antilla trichophora include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Antilla trichophora is commonly used to prepare herbal tea, juice, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies such as Ayurvedic and Unani medicines.
